products.name: Unusual Machines Drone Motors
products.descriptor: USA-built drone motor family for speed and torque applications

evidence.snippet:
Full Line Of Drone Motors – All Built In The USA
------------------------------------------------
Engineered for high-efficiency and durability across a wide range of mission requirements, Unusual Machines motors feature high-temperature windings and premium EZO bearings, delivering smooth, reliable thrust for both speed & torque applications. No matter the challenge, you can count on Unusual Machines for all your professional-grade propulsion needs.

products.notes: No individual model names disclosed on products page; treated as a family.

products.name: Fat Shark HDO+ Headset
products.descriptor: USA-built FPV pilot headset with dual 1920×1080 OLED displays

evidence.snippet:
Fat Shark HDO+ Headset
----------------------
Built in the USA, the HDO+ delivers industry-leading situational awareness via dual 1920×1080 OLED displays and a wide 50° field of view. A built-in DVR, onboard ventilation, and a flexible 7–25V power input guarantee it’s always mission-ready. Engineered for performance and reliability, the HDO+ sets the standard for professional-grade.
Data Sheet Request Quote

products.notes: Page-level NDAA claim present but no explicit per-product NDAA statement.

products.name: Aura Analog FPV Camera Module
products.descriptor: NDAA-compliant analog FPV camera with Sony STARVIS 2 CMOS sensor

evidence.snippet: Built around the Sony 1/2.8” STARVIS 2 CMOS sensor, the NDAA compliant Aura delivers improved low-light performance, enhanced dynamic range, and highly detailed analog video for demanding mission applications. With 1500 TVL resolution, a 150° field of view, switchable 16:9/4:3 aspect ratios, and a flexible 5–25V input range, Aura ensures crisp, high-contrast image capture in the most challenging environments.

products.name: Aura Video Transmitter (VTX)
products.descriptor: Blue UAS approved NDAA-compliant 5.8 GHz analog FPV video transmitter up to 1 W

evidence.snippet: Blue UAS approved and NDAA compliant, this high-performance 5.8GHz analog VTX is built for professional applications. Delivering up to 1W output power with selectable 25–1000mW levels, Raceband 1–8 channels, and Tramp protocol control for precise tuning. Designed with a durable M2 20×20 mounting pattern, wide 7–36V input, and MMCX antenna connection, all in a lightweight 13g package.

products.name: Brave F7 Flight Controller
products.descriptor: F7 processor flight controller with BMI270 IMU and BetaFlight support, 30×30 footprint
products.notes: Page-level NDAA claim present but no explicit per-product NDAA statement.

products.name: Brave 55A 4-in-1 Electronic Speed Controller (ESC)
products.descriptor: USA-built Blue UAS certified 55A 4-in-1 32-bit ESC for 3–8S drones

evidence.snippet:
Brave 55A 4-in-1 Electronic Speed Controller (ESC)
--------------------------------------------------
Built in the USA, the Brave 55A is Blue UAS Certified. This 32-bit AM32 ESC boasts solder-free connections, current sensing and support for 3-8S input (10-35V), 55A continuous current (75A burst) and full DSHOT compatibility up to DSHOT1200. Experience the reliability, performance and mission-ready durability all in a single 30×30 package.

products.notes: Explicitly Blue UAS Certified; page-level NDAA claim present but no explicit per-product NDAA statement.
